Home Renovation Cost Calculator

Estimate your home renovation costs. Select project types and quality level to get a detailed cost breakdown.

FAQ

How much does a kitchen remodel cost?

A minor kitchen remodel costs $15,000-$30,000. A major remodel runs $40,000-$80,000+. Average ROI is 60-80%.

How much does a bathroom remodel cost?

A bathroom remodel typically costs $10,000-$30,000 depending on size and finishes. Average ROI is 60-70%.

What renovations add the most value?

Kitchen and bathroom remodels, adding a deck, replacing the garage door, and new siding typically offer the best ROI.
